name: Roasted Garlic Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Remove loose, papery skins from garlic.
3. Place whole head, root end down, in a shallow baking dish.
4. Roast for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, or until garlic is very soft.
5. Allow garlic to cool enough to handle safely.
6. Squeeze the soft garlic out of its skin.
7. Spread on toast or bread for a delicious treat.
Variation:
1. Mix roasted garlic with 3 cups cooked white beans.
2. Process in blender or food processor until smooth.
3. Add 1/4 teaspoon crushed red pepper for hot spice.
